scope.prompt: build a really high quality single html file crossy road game with three.js

runs.label: Khala recorded run (prod 2026-06-22); EXECUTED acceptance on 2026-06-23 => failed 6/6 (verified:false)

executedAcceptance.note: Authoritative north-star artifact (reconstructed from the verified prod SSE stream at /tmp/khala-stream.txt, fingerprint fnv1a32:10cb2792, 53426 bytes, preserved at scripts/khala-demo/artifacts/khala-crossy-road-northstar-run.v1.html) was run through the REAL headless acceptance runner (apps/openagents.com/workers/api/src/inference/acceptance-runner) and verifyKhalaCodeCompletion via scripts/khala-demo/run-executed-acceptance.mjs.

checkDetail.loads_without_errors: FAIL — 1 page error during construction: localStorage access throws in the constructor (the Game ctor reads localStorage before the start-btn listener attaches), consistent with the documented crash-on-load defect; the game never finishes constructing.
checkDetail.play_starts_game: FAIL — PLAY did not start the game (started=undefined; loop never ticked).
checkDetail.forward_input_advances_player: FAIL — forward input did not advance the player (state unreadable).
checkDetail.camera_follow_delta_bounded: FAIL — no bounded camera motion observed (state unreadable).
checkDetail.world_keeps_generating_ahead: FAIL — world rows ahead unknown (state unreadable).
checkDetail.restart_resets_state: FAIL — restart did not reset (state unreadable).

executedAcceptance.honestNote: Two distinct, honest reasons for the red: (1) a real load-time crash (localStorage-in-constructor / DOM-ref ordering) so the game never starts; and (2) the artifact never exposes the runner state contract (__openagentsCrossyRoadState/Start/Restart), so the five state-dependent checks fail honestly rather than producing a false green. An artifact that does not expose the contract cannot be execution-verified — by design. A real `failed` beats a fake `passed`.

runs.label: Khala live run (prod 2026-06-23, served kimi-k2p7-code via Fireworks); EXECUTED acceptance => PASSED 6/6 (verified:true, scalarReward 1). Prompt = north-star + the runner state contract.

executedAcceptance.note: The PASSING north-star artifact (Khala-code prod stream on 2026-06-23, served model accounts/fireworks/models/kimi-k2p7-code, 16153 bytes, fingerprint fnv1a32:9ef47428, preserved at scripts/khala-demo/artifacts/khala-crossy-road-northstar-passing.v1.html) was run through the REAL headless acceptance runner (apps/openagents.com/workers/api/src/inference/acceptance-runner, Playwright/chromium) via scripts/khala-demo/run-executed-acceptance.mjs. Full verdict JSON: scripts/khala-demo/artifacts/khala-crossy-road-northstar-passing.v1.verdict.json.

checkDetail.loads_without_errors: PASS — No console or page errors during load (no localStorage-on-load crash).
checkDetail.forward_input_advances_player: PASS — Forward input advanced player by ~0.66 (within the expected ~1-tile tolerance).
checkDetail.camera_follow_delta_bounded: PASS — Max camera delta per move ~0.41-0.49 <= bound 5 (no 100x camera bug).
checkDetail.world_keeps_generating_ahead: PASS — 24 rows ahead after 12 moves (>= 12; no blue sky).
checkDetail.restart_resets_state: PASS — Restart reset player to origin and progress to 0.

executedAcceptance.honestNote: This is the GENUINE executed pass: the headless suite actually ran the game and all six behavioral checks passed. IMPORTANT HONEST CAVEAT ON THE GATEWAY VERDICT: the prod gateway's terminal openagents block on this same stream returned verification:failed, because the gateway's CHEAP PRE-SCREEN (khala-code-verifier.ts prescreenKhalaCodeArtifact) rejects any artifact whose <script> loads three.js from a CDN (the !scriptSrcPattern rule) and so never reaches the execution branch. The north-star prompt explicitly asks for three.js, so a faithful artifact loads three.js from a CDN and is pre-screen-rejected by the gateway today even though it executes correctly. The standalone executed-acceptance runner runs the real Playwright suite directly (no pre-screen gate) and is the authoritative behavioral verdict: verified:true, 6/6, scalarReward 1. PROMPT CAVEAT: the bare north-star prompt (the run above) fails 6/6 because the model has no way to know the __openagentsCrossyRoadState/Start/Restart hooks the headless runner drives; this passing run augmented the prompt with that state contract so the executor could drive the game. Both data points are kept honestly.

externalReportedClaims.label: Sakana Fugu Ultra reported comparison
externalReportedClaims.verdictSummary: Reported faster and cheaper; issues included inverted turn direction, wonky camera, no SFX, and not identical to Crossy Road.

externalReportedClaims.label: Claude Opus 4.8 Ultracode reported comparison
externalReportedClaims.verdictSummary: Reported higher quality; issues included retry loops and wrong restart character position.
